English.string: Barrier can take [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] up to an additional {0}% of your [Armour] and [Evasion|Evasion Rating]

[ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] from [HitDamage|Hits] is taken from the Barrier before your Life, Mana or [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]
